Work
Live, Shipped Products
AI AGENT
THE KEEPER
A proactive personal AI agent running in production — knows your life, fires touchpoints before you ask, reflects nightly, and surfaces everything via Telegram or a generative-UI web surface.
Hardest part: Built a pluggable multi-provider LLM adapter (Anthropic / Gemini / OpenRouter) that correctly echoes Gemini 3's hidden thought_signature on every tool call — a silent protocol requirement that kills all tool use without it.
TypeScript Supabase Railway Postgres FTS Gemini / Claude SSE
Private · Personal Use
MOBILE WEB
Bashu Web
Rebuilt a client's iOS app as a full-stack React web application in under a week — same UX, tree animations, community feed, and ForYou discovery — live on Vercel.
Hardest part: Reproducing iOS-native tree animations and content-card flow in pure React — no mobile framework, no native APIs, matching the app's feel exactly using CSS transitions and Supabase real-time subscriptions.
React TypeScript Supabase Firebase Vercel
Live ↗
DELIVERY PLATFORM
EggRun
End-to-end egg ordering and delivery platform for a Namibian vendor — anonymous public ordering with a Leaflet map pin-drop for delivery location and a vendor dispatch dashboard.
Hardest part: Designing Supabase SECURITY DEFINER RPCs so anonymous users can place and track orders without any authentication, while every byte of vendor and financial data stays locked behind row-level security.
React Supabase Leaflet / OSM PostgreSQL Vercel
Live ↗ Vendor demo on request
ENTERPRISE SAAS
Security Payroll & Accounting
Full payroll, shift-scheduling, and double-entry accounting system for a Namibian security company — Namibia Labour Act s.17(3) 70 hr overtime cap enforced in code, with ABSA bank-file export.
Hardest part: Building a double-entry ledger that auto-posts from every payroll run — each salary disbursement atomically creates matching debit/credit journal entries and updates AR/AP, with zero manual accounting intervention.
React Supabase Python PostgreSQL AI Assistant
Demo on request
About
Based in Windhoek.
Shipping globally.

I'm an Honours Computer Science graduate from NUST (Namibia University of Science & Technology), specialising in software development. I work as a freelance engineer building production systems across industries — AI agents, SaaS platforms, delivery apps, ERP customisation, and game development.

My background spans full-stack web development, AI agent architecture, ERP customisation (Acumatica), and systems administration. I've built and deployed software for security companies, consumer app clients, vendors, and institutions across Namibia.

I move fast from idea to live product, own everything through deployment and iteration, and pick up new stacks quickly. UTC+2 timezone — available for African, European, and US East Coast overlap. Actively looking for remote engineering roles.
